reasoning: The primary limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance, leading to a 9.3% power drop from the 5-min to 20-min efforts. The last ride was a steady endurance session, now it's time to challenge your aerobic base and improve your fatigue resistance in a more targeted way. This session specifically prepares you for the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6 x 5min sets: 3min at 201-218W and 2min at 242-256W.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
